atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain for approximately three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient recalls strenuous basement work.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient recalls reaching overhead.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as worsening with pressure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as worsening with overhead reaching.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty reaching for objects.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports taking two extra strength Tylenol.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports taking two extra strength Tylenol every six to eight hours.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports two extra strength Tylenol provides some relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing aches and pains in the past.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports this pain is different.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports unbearable pain when laying on the shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes Tylenol

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to continue the patient taking Tylenol as needed

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers the patient to physical therapy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans for physical therapy for approximately six to eight weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up visit in four weeks after the patient completes physical therapy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a cervical MRI
